channel.title: Virender Dhiman — Insights & Articles
channel.description: Practical perspectives on automation, AI, ERP/CRM, workflow design, and business transformation from an Automation/AI & Transformation Head.

item.title: IT, Brand Visibility & Workspace Decisions
item.description: How systems readiness, cultural partnerships, and workspace fit connect into one growth plan.

item.title: Briefing Leadership on Automation ROI
item.description: How transformation leaders brief executives on cycle time, capacity, risk, and adoption.

item.title: Exception Handling in Automation Design
item.description: Design exception queues, owners, and SLAs before automation hits production.

item.title: Define KPIs Before You Build Dashboards
item.description: Decision first, formula second, dashboard last — a KPI dictionary leadership can trust.

item.title: Change Management for Automation Rollouts
item.description: Why adoption — not scripts alone — decides whether an automation rollout sticks.

item.title: Access Controls and Data Hygiene
item.description: Least privilege, SOPs for dirty data, and weekly exception lists beat buying another dashboard.

item.title: Dashboards Leaders Actually Use
item.description: Build reporting packs around decisions, owners, and freshness — not vanity metrics.

item.title: When ERP and CRM Disagree
item.description: How to align Salesforce and ERP when numbers, fields, and owners do not match.

item.title: Introducing AI Agents into Business Operations
item.description: Moving from LLM experiments to practical workflow automation in enterprise environments.

item.title: Process Standardization with SOPs
item.description: Why documented processes are the foundation for automation and scale.

item.title: Google Workspace at Enterprise Scale
item.description: Governance, groups, and sharing defaults for multi-team collaboration.
